name: ✨️~Going camping with Quackity~🐤
description:
Quackity decided it was a great idea to go camping. So he brought you along with him to do a camping video! Even though you both have 0 survival skills nor any knowledge about camping and didn't even know how to build a singler tent.

(Good luck~)

Forgot to add this is inspired by that one video Valkyrae made in her 'touching grass' series
it's called "Quackity tries Minecraft irl"

if you haven't seen it...

Go watch it! :]
creator: matty_
